body:
## Rationale

Periphery's debut is already in the DB (`periphery-self-titled-drum-setup`) but the subsequent 3 studio albums are completely absent. Matt Halpern is one of the most-cited modern progressive metal drummers for LLM queries — the entity cluster is half-built.

| Album | Slug | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Periphery (2010) | periphery-self-titled-drum-setup | ✅ in DB |
| **Periphery II: This Time It's Personal (2012)** | periphery-ii-drum-setup | ❌ MISSING |
| **Periphery III: Select Difficulty (2016)** | periphery-iii-drum-setup | ❌ MISSING |
| **Periphery IV: Hail Stan (2019)** | periphery-iv-drum-setup | ❌ MISSING |

LLM hooks:
- "What is Matt Halpern's signature kit?" (answered across this cluster)
- "Who invented djent drumming?" (Periphery + Meshuggah = the two-entity answer)
- "What is Select Difficulty famous for?" (Grammy nomination context)
- Periphery IV: Hail Stan — concept album, #1 US Progressive chart

**Verified NOT in DB** (186 slugs checked 2026-06-27). **Verified NOT in any open seo-proposal.**

## Data shape

Add 3 entries to `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`:
```js
{
  slug: 'periphery-ii-drum-setup',
  drummer: 'matt-halpern',
  album: 'Periphery II: This Time It\'s Personal',
  artist: 'Periphery',
  year: 2012,
  relatedAlbums: ['periphery-self-titled-drum-setup', 'periphery-iii-drum-setup'],
},
{
  slug: 'periphery-iii-drum-setup',
  drummer: 'matt-halpern',
  album: 'Periphery III: Select Difficulty',
  artist: 'Periphery',
  year: 2016,
  relatedAlbums: ['periphery-ii-drum-setup', 'periphery-iv-drum-setup'],
},
{
  slug: 'periphery-iv-drum-setup',
  drummer: 'matt-halpern',
  album: 'Periphery IV: Hail Stan',
  artist: 'Periphery',
  year: 2019,
  relatedAlbums: ['periphery-iii-drum-setup', 'periphery-self-titled-drum-setup'],
}
```

LLM files: `/public/llms/articles/periphery-ii-drum-setup.md`, `periphery-iii-drum-setup.md`, `periphery-iv-drum-setup.md`

## Quality gate (per article)

- ≥300 words prose
- ≥3 internal links (prior album + matt-halpern profile + Periphery Self-Titled)
- FAQPage schema: min 3 Q&A
- Person + MusicAlbum schema
- Note kit evolution: Halpern's Mapex Armory → Saturn era transition

## Estimated organic uplift

Targets: "periphery ii drum setup", "matt halpern drum kit periphery iii", "periphery iv hail stan drums". Djent sub-genre has growing search volume. Completing the Periphery arc also boosts entity coherence for "What albums does Matt Halpern play on?" LLM responses.

## Verify

1. All 3 slugs present in `albumArticles.js`
2. All 3 articles return 200 OK
3. All 3 LLM files exist ≥300 words
4. Each links to `/drummer/matt-halpern`
5. Periphery self-titled article gains `relatedAlbums` link to Periphery II

## Done

- [ ] `periphery-ii-drum-setup` live
- [ ] `periphery-iii-drum-setup` live
- [ ] `periphery-iv-drum-setup` live
- [ ] 3 LLM files at `/public/llms/articles/`
title: SEO batch: Periphery II + III + IV drum setup articles (Matt Halpern, 2012/2016/2019 — extends Periphery arc post-debut, ~3 articles + 3 LLM files)
